0.content:
# 🌐 [CLIENT_NAME] [LOCATION] — Frontend Requests & Performance

**Application:** [APP_NAME] (`APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX`) | **Data Source:** Gen 3 RUM (`user.events`)

Monitors **request load** (volume, throughput) and **response time performance** (avg, p50, p90, p95) for all XHR/fetch/resource requests made by the frontend.
Breaks down by first-party vs third-party, top domains, device types, and trends over time.

> **Tip:** Use the timeframe selector to adjust the analysis window. Default queries use 24h.

1.query: data record(a="📊 KPI Summary — Request Load & Performance")

2.title: 🌐 Total Requests
2.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| summarize total_requests = count()

3.title: 👤 Active Sessions
3.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| summarize sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id)

4.title: ⚡ Avg Response Time
4.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| summarize avg_ms = avg(duration) / 1000000

5.title: 🔺 P95 Response Time
5.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| summarize p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000

6.title: 📈 Request Volume Over Time
6.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), interval:30m

7.title: ⏱️ Response Time Over Time (Avg & P95)
7.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| makeTimeseries avg_ms = avg(duration), p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95), interval:30m
| fieldsAdd avg_ms = avg_ms[] / 1000000, p95_ms = p95_ms[] / 1000000

8.query: data record(a="🏢 First-Party vs Third-Party Request Breakdown")

9.title: 📊 Requests by Provider Type
9.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| summarize 
    requests = count(),
    avg_ms = avg(duration) / 1000000,
    p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000,
    sessions = countDistinct(dt.rum.session.id),
    by:{url.provider}
| sort requests desc

10.title: ⏱️ Response Time by Provider (Avg & P95 ms)
10.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| summarize 
    requests = count(),
    Avg_ms = avg(duration) / 1000000,
    P50_ms = percentile(duration, 50) / 1000000,
    P90_ms = percentile(duration, 90) / 1000000,
    P95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000,
    by:{url.provider}
| sort requests desc

11.title: 📈 Request Volume by Provider Over Time
11.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), by:{url.provider}, interval:30m

12.query: data record(a="🔗 Top Request Domains — Load & Performance")

13.title: 🔗 Top 15 Domains by Request Volume
13.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| summarize 
    Requests = count(),
    Avg_ms = avg(duration) / 1000000,
    P95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000,
    by:{url.domain}
| sort Requests desc
| limit 15

14.title: 📊 Top 10 Domains — Request Volume
14.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| summarize Requests = count(), by:{url.domain}
| sort Requests desc
| limit 10

16.title: 📱 Request Volume by Device Type
16.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| summarize 
    Requests = count(),
    Avg_ms = avg(duration) / 1000000,
    P95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000,
    by:{device.type}
| sort Requests desc

17.title: 🌍 Response Time by Device Type
17.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| summarize 
    Requests = count(),
    Avg_ms = avg(duration) / 1000000,
    P50_ms = percentile(duration, 50) / 1000000,
    P90_ms = percentile(duration, 90) / 1000000,
    P95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000,
    by:{device.type}
| sort Requests desc

18.title: 🌐 Top Browsers by Request Volume & Performance
18.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| summarize 
    Requests = count(),
    Avg_ms = avg(duration) / 1000000,
    P95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000,
    by:{browser.name}
| sort Requests desc
| limit 10

19.title: 📊 Requests per Session by Device Type Over Time
19.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), by:{device.type}, interval:1h

20.query: data record(a="🔍 First-Party Domain Investigation — Request Volume & Response Time Spikes")

21.title: 📈 First-Party Request Volume by Domain Over Time
21.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request" and url.provider == "first_party"
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), by:{url.domain}, interval:15m

22.title: ⚡ First-Party P95 Response Time by Domain Over Time
22.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request" and url.provider == "first_party"
| makeTimeseries p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95), by:{url.domain}, interval:15m
| fieldsAdd p95_ms = p95_ms[] / 1000000

23.title: ⏱️ First-Party Avg Response Time by Domain Over Time
23.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request" and url.provider == "first_party"
| makeTimeseries avg_ms = avg(duration), by:{url.domain}, interval:15m
| fieldsAdd avg_ms = avg_ms[] / 1000000

24.query: data record(a="🏠 www.example.com — Request Deep Dive (Highest Volume First-Party)")

25.title: 📈 www.example.com — Request Volume (15m intervals)
25.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request" and url.domain == "www.example.com"
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), interval:15m

26.title: ⚡ www.example.com — Response Time (Avg / P90 / P95)
26.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request" and url.domain == "www.example.com"
| makeTimeseries avg_ms = avg(duration), p90_ms = percentile(duration, 90), p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95), interval:15m
| fieldsAdd avg_ms = avg_ms[] / 1000000, p90_ms = p90_ms[] / 1000000, p95_ms = p95_ms[] / 1000000

27.query: data record(a="🎫 Ticketing (tickets.example.com) — Request Deep Dive")

28.title: 📈 Ticketing — Request Volume (15m intervals)
28.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request" and url.domain == "tickets.example.com"
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), interval:15m

29.title: ⚡ Ticketing — Response Time (Avg / P90 / P95)
29.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request" and url.domain == "tickets.example.com"
| makeTimeseries avg_ms = avg(duration), p90_ms = percentile(duration, 90), p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95), interval:15m
| fieldsAdd avg_ms = avg_ms[] / 1000000, p90_ms = p90_ms[] / 1000000, p95_ms = p95_ms[] / 1000000

30.query: data record(a="🏨 Vacations (vacations.example.com) — Request Deep Dive")

31.title: 📈 Vacations — Request Volume (15m intervals)
31.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request" and url.domain == "vacations.example.com"
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), interval:15m

32.title: ⚡ Vacations — Response Time (Avg / P90 / P95)
32.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request" and url.domain == "vacations.example.com"
| makeTimeseries avg_ms = avg(duration), p90_ms = percentile(duration, 90), p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95), interval:15m
| fieldsAdd avg_ms = avg_ms[] / 1000000, p90_ms = p90_ms[] / 1000000, p95_ms = p95_ms[] / 1000000

33.query: data record(a="🐢 Slow Request Investigation — Requests > 1s and > 3s")

34.title: 🐢 Slow Requests (>1s) Over Time by Domain
34.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request" and duration > 1000000000
| makeTimeseries slow_requests = count(), by:{url.domain}, interval:15m

35.title: 🚨 Very Slow Requests (>3s) Over Time by Domain
35.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request" and duration > 3000000000
| makeTimeseries very_slow = count(), by:{url.domain}, interval:15m

36.title: 📊 Slow Request Summary by Domain (>1s)
36.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| summarize 
    Total = count(),
    Slow_1s = countIf(duration > 1000000000),
    Slow_3s = countIf(duration > 3000000000),
    Pct_Slow_1s = countIf(duration > 1000000000) * 100.0 / count(),
    Avg_ms = avg(duration) / 1000000,
    P95_ms = percentile(duration, 95) / 1000000,
    by:{url.domain}
| sort Slow_1s desc
| limit 15

37.query: data record(a="📡 Third-Party Request Impact — Noisy Neighbour Detection")

38.title: 📈 Third-Party Request Volume by Domain Over Time (Top 8)
38.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request" and url.provider == "third_party"
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), by:{url.domain}, interval:15m

39.title: ⚡ Third-Party P95 Response Time by Domain Over Time
39.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request" and url.provider == "third_party"
| makeTimeseries p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95), by:{url.domain}, interval:15m
| fieldsAdd p95_ms = p95_ms[] / 1000000

40.query: data record(a="🔄 Request Performance by HTTP Method")

41.title: 📈 Request Volume by HTTP Method Over Time
41.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), by:{http.request.method}, interval:15m

42.title: ⚡ P95 Response Time by HTTP Method Over Time
42.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| makeTimeseries p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95), by:{http.request.method}, interval:15m
| fieldsAdd p95_ms = p95_ms[] / 1000000

43.query: data record(a="🧩 Request Initiator Type Breakdown (XHR vs Fetch vs Resource)")

44.title: 📈 Request Volume by Initiator Type Over Time
44.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| makeTimeseries requests = count(), by:{performance.initiator_type}, interval:15m

45.title: ⚡ P95 Response Time by Initiator Type Over Time
45.query:
fetch user.events, from:now()-24h
| filter dt.rum.application.entity == "APPLICATION-XXXXXXXXXXXX" and characteristics.classifier == "request"
| makeTimeseries p95_ms = percentile(duration, 95), by:{performance.initiator_type}, interval:15m
| fieldsAdd p95_ms = p95_ms[] / 1000000
